summary: Implements v27 plan Track T1: adds a .github/workflows/docs.yml workflow that runs cargo test --doc for each Rust crate (pheno-errors, pheno-otel, pheno-port-adapter) on ubuntu-latest, triggered by push, PR, and daily cron at 06:00 UTC. Fixes crate-level doc omissions to enable baseline doc-test pass: pheno-port-adapter gets /// doc comments on 8 items (4 AdapterError variants, 4 PortAdapter methods), pheno-errors gets serde_json dev-dependency for rfc7807.rs doc-test.
commit_message: feat(v27-T1): add doc-test CI job across workspace crates

actions.rationale: New workflow with 38 lines: matrix across 3 Rust crates, uses dtolnay/rust-toolchain for stable Rust + cargo test --doc --jobs 4 (overrides .cargo/config.toml jobs=0). Triggered by push, PR, and daily cron at 06:00 UTC.

Added /// doc comments to 4 AdapterError variants and 4 PortAdapter trait methods. Required because the crate uses #![deny(missing_docs)] at line 1, which would block doc-test compilation for any undocumented public item.

Added serde_json = "1" to [dev-dependencies]. The doc-test code block in rfc7807.rs (line 30) uses serde_json::to_string(), which requires serde_json as a direct dev-dependency for doc-test compilation.

observations.scope_reality_vs_plan: Plan called for 'all workspace members.' After git ls-tree on origin/main, 3 Rust crates with Cargo.toml exist: pheno-errors, pheno-otel, pheno-port-adapter. pheno-flags exists locally but not on origin/main. The remaining pheno-* directories (pheno-llms-txt, pheno-scaffold-kit, pheno-secret-scan, pheno-ssot-template, pheno-vibecoding-guard, pheno-worklog-schema) are Python or template projects without Cargo.toml.

doc_test_blockers.pheno_errors_rfc7807_serde_json: Doc-test in rfc7807.rs uses serde_json::to_string but serde_json was not in [dev-dependencies]. Fixed: added serde_json = "1".
doc_test_blockers.pheno_port_adapter_missing_docs: Crate uses #![deny(missing_docs)]; 8 undocumented public items blocked compilation. Fixed: added /// comments to all variants and methods.
doc_test_blockers.cargo_config_jobs_0: .cargo/config.toml has jobs=0 which causes cargo to fail. Fixed: overridden with --jobs 4 in workflow.

next_wave_hooks.v27_T3_track: L60 LFS audit policy — no overlap
next_wave_hooks.v27_T4_track: L19 fleet-wide perf gates — no overlap
next_wave_hooks.blockers: None — all 3 doc-test compilations pass locally. Full CI validation pending PR merge.
